notes:
Report Viewer is live. Paste any battle or scout report and read it laid out the way the game lays it out, with the real troop and hero art - then share it with a short link that opens in any browser, on any device.
The same viewer runs at opticmonitor.com, so anyone can read a report you send them without installing anything.
Reports are archived, so a link keeps working long after the game deletes the original file.
New Tools section, report themes, and Random Ports now tracked on the Items tab.
